features.name: Alation Catalog Browser
features.description: Embedded Datagrok app that connects to a configured Alation data catalog instance, letting users browse catalogued data sources, tables, and queries and bring them into Datagrok workflows.
features.evidence_summary: The plugin exposes exactly one user-facing entry point — an app function named 'Alation' — and all changelog entries and docs describe improvements to this single catalog integration.
